summary: The provided literature does not support the idea that mitochondria can pass through membrane nanotubes; all referenced studies focus on mitochondrial function or movement via other pathways without mentioning membrane nanotube-mediated transit. Thus, there is insufficient evidence to conclude this mechanism occurs.
